name: Scene Weave
summary: Transform briefs into prose with choices
purpose: Transform Passage Briefs into full prose Passages with dialogue, sensory detail, and contrastive choices. Voice first, structure assumed stable.
description: Transforms passage_brief artifacts into passage prose. Scene Smith writes dialogue, sensory detail, and contrastive choices. Style Lead reviews for voice consistency. Gatekeeper validates against quality bars. Does NOT modify topology - structure is assumed stable from story_spark. CRITICAL: If structural issues (integrity, reachability, invalid topology) are found, ESCALATE to Showrunner for story_spark rework. scene_weave cannot fix structural problems. Outputs passage artifacts in review state ready for canonization.

triggers.condition: Passage Briefs are ready from Story Spark
Style Lead requests prose revision for voice consistency
Gatekeeper flags style or presentation issues in existing passages

required_artifacts.description: Story manifest for context and IFID
Topology artifact for validating choice targets
Passage Briefs from Story Spark defining structure and intent

optional_artifacts.description: Unified style guide for prose and visual consistency

context_requirements: Style Guide from workspace (voice, register, visual language)
Codex entries relevant to the passage (player-safe references)
Canon summaries if needed for accurate portrayal (request from Lore Weaver)

required_artifacts.description: Full prose Passages with choices and gates. Created in draft, promoted to review when playbook completes successfully. The review state indicates studio work is complete and passages are ready for human review or canonization.

optional_artifacts.description: Scene-level hooks (traits, tells, props, style questions)

prose_drafting.name: Prose Drafting
prose_drafting.purpose: Transform each Passage Brief into draft prose with dialogue, choices, and sensory detail

load_context.action: Load story and topology artifacts to understand the overall structure and validate choice targets.
load_context.guidance: Read the topology to understand which passages connect to which. Your choice targets MUST match the topology links. Do not invent new connections.

draft_prose.action: Draft passage prose following the brief's intent, stakes, and choice intents. Make choices clear and contrastive. Express gates diegetically. Validate that choice targets match topology links.
draft_prose.guidance: Honor the Plotwright brief - do not invent new topology. Two clear options beat five near-synonyms. Gates must read as world facts (badge, knowledge, reputation, tool), never as mechanics. Never print codeword names, flag IDs, or schema references in prose. Each choice target MUST reference a valid topology link from this passage's pid.

outputs.name: draft_passages
outputs.description: Draft passages ready for style review

validate_topology_alignment.action: Verify all passage choice targets match topology links from the source passage.
validate_topology_alignment.guidance: For each choice in the passage, verify the target matches a link in topology.links where from == this passage's pid. If misaligned, either fix the choice target or escalate to Plotwright via hook.

generate_scene_hooks.action: Create hook cards for ideas that arose during prose writing. This step is MANDATORY - at least one hook or explicit justification required.
generate_scene_hooks.guidance: Review your prose and create hooks for ANY of these triggers: (1) character_note: Character trait or tell emerged, (2) scene_idea: Environmental detail worth expanding, (3) style_note: Voice or register uncertainty, (4) media_cue: Visual or audio enhancement opportunity, (5) canon_gap: Missing lore discovered (lore issue). If no triggers occurred, you MUST state explicitly: 'No hook triggers occurred because [reason]'

completion_criteria: Every Passage Brief has a corresponding draft Passage
Choices are contrastive (differ in intent and outcome)
No internal mechanics visible in prose
All choice targets align with topology links
At least one hook_card created OR explicit justification that no triggers occurred

style_review.name: Style Review
style_review.purpose: Verify voice consistency and flag any drift from established register

check_voice.action: Review draft passages for voice, register, visual language alignment, and motif consistency. Flag drift and propose corrections.
check_voice.guidance: Style Lead reviews prose for voice consistency and visual language alignment. Cross-check against Style Guide. Flag drift but offer smallest viable fix.

apply_corrections.action: Apply style corrections to draft passages based on feedback.

completion_criteria: Passages are in-voice per style guardrails

on_failure.message: Style review found drift. Return to Prose Drafting with style feedback.

self_validation.name: Self Validation
self_validation.purpose: Scene Smith self-checks before requesting formal gatecheck

validate_passages.action: Self-validate passages against schema and quality criteria. Use validate_artifact tool.
validate_passages.guidance: Check: topology alignment (all choices match links), spoiler hygiene (no canon leakage), choice integrity (contrastive options), diegetic gates (no mechanics). Fix any issues before requesting gatecheck.

completion_criteria: All choice targets align with topology

on_failure.message: Self-validation failed. Return to Prose Drafting with validation feedback.

gatecheck_request.name: Gatecheck Request
gatecheck_request.purpose: Request formal Gatekeeper review of completed passages

submit_for_review.action: Submit passages to Gatekeeper for formal gatecheck against all 8 quality bars.
submit_for_review.guidance: Gatekeeper enforces: Integrity, Reachability, Nonlinearity, Gateways, Style, Determinism, Presentation, Accessibility. Block with reason and offer smallest viable fix.

on_success.message: Passages approved and promoted to review state. Ready for human review or canonization (review -> cold) via separate approval flow.

runtime_actions.description: Commit approved passages to manuscript store

parallel.description: Triage scene hooks generated during prose drafting

conditional.condition: All passages for current milestone are in manuscript store
conditional.description: Export completed story segment for distribution

on_failure.message: Gatecheck blocked. For non-structural issues (style, presentation), return to Prose Drafting. For STRUCTURAL issues (integrity, reachability, topology), escalate to Showrunner for story_spark rework - scene_weave CANNOT fix structural problems.
